instructions.instruction: Use multi-stage builds so build tooling never ships in the runtime image.
NEVER run the container as root; create and switch to a non-root USER before CMD/ENTRYPOINT.
NEVER use the :latest base image tag; pin an explicit version (ideally a digest).
Generate a .dockerignore alongside every Dockerfile to keep build context small.
Add a HEALTHCHECK for long-running services.
Validate the generated Dockerfile with the dockerfile-validator skill and fix findings before finishing.
